en: Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by the will of God, To the saints who are in Ephesus, and are faithful in Christ Jesus:
zh: 奉 神旨意作基督耶穌使徒的保羅，寫信給住在以弗所，在基督耶穌裡忠心的聖徒。

en: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
zh: 願恩惠平安從我們的父 神和主耶穌基督臨到你們。

en: Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who has blessed us in Christ with every spiritual blessing in the heavenly places,
zh: 我們主耶穌基督的父 神是應當稱頌的。他在基督裡，曾經把天上各種屬靈的福分賜給我們：

en: even as he chose us in him before the foundation of the world, that we should be holy and blameless before him. In love
zh: 就如創立世界以前，他在基督裡揀選了我們，使我們因著愛，在他面前成為聖潔，沒有瑕疵。

en: he predestined us for adoption through Jesus Christ, according to the purpose of his will,
zh: 他又按著自己旨意所喜悅的，預定我們藉著耶穌基督得兒子的名分，

en: to the praise of his glorious grace, with which he has blessed us in the Beloved.
zh: 好使他恩典的榮耀得著頌讚。這恩典是他在愛子裡賜給我們的。

en: In him we have redemption through his blood, the forgiveness of our trespasses, according to the riches of his grace,
zh: 我們在他愛子裡，藉著他的血蒙了救贖，過犯得到赦免，都是按著他豐盛的恩典。

en: which he lavished upon us, in all wisdom and insight
zh: 這恩典是他用各樣的智慧和聰明，充充足足地賜給我們的；

en: making known to us the mystery of his will, according to his purpose, which he set forth in Christ
zh: 他照著自己在基督裡預先安排的美意，使我們知道他旨意的奧祕，

en: as a plan for the fullness of time, to unite all things in him, things in heaven and things on earth.
zh: 到了所計劃的時機成熟，就使天上地上的萬有，都在基督裡同歸於一。

en: In him we have obtained an inheritance, having been predestined according to the purpose of him who works all things according to the counsel of his will,
zh: 那憑著自己旨意所計劃而行萬事的，按著他預先所安排的，預定我們在基督裡得基業 ，

en: so that we who were the first to hope in Christ might be to the praise of his glory.
zh: 藉著我們這在基督裡首先有盼望的人，使他的榮耀得著頌讚。

en: In him you also, when you heard the word of truth, the gospel of your salvation, and believed in him, were sealed with the promised Holy Spirit,
zh: 你們既然聽了真理的道，就是使你們得救的福音，也信了基督，就在他裡面受了所應許的聖靈作為印記。

en: who is the guarantee of our inheritance until we acquire possession of it, to the praise of his glory.
zh: 這聖靈是我們得基業的憑據，直到 神的產業得贖，使他的榮耀得著頌讚。

en: For this reason, because I have heard of your faith in the Lord Jesus and your love toward all the saints,
zh: 因此，我聽到你們在主耶穌裡的信心，和對眾聖徒的愛心，

en: I do not cease to give thanks for you, remembering you in my prayers,
zh: 就不住地為你們獻上感謝。我禱告的時候，常常提到你們，

en: that the God of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of glory, may give you a spirit of wisdom and of revelation in the knowledge of him,
zh: 求我們主耶穌基督的 神，榮耀的父，賜給你們智慧和啟示的靈，使你們充分地認識他，

en: having the eyes of your hearts enlightened, that you may know what is the hope to which he has called you, what are the riches of his glorious inheritance in the saints,
zh: 並且使你們心靈的眼睛明亮，可以知道他的呼召有怎樣的盼望；他基業的榮耀，在聖徒中是多麼的豐盛；

en: and what is the immeasurable greatness of his power toward us who believe, according to the working of his great might
zh: 神照著他強大的力量，向我們信他的人顯出的能力，是何等的浩大。

en: that he worked in Christ when he raised him from the dead and seated him at his right hand in the heavenly places,
zh: 這力量運行在基督身上，使他從死人中復活，並且在天上坐在自己的右邊，

en: far above all rule and authority and power and dominion, and above every name that is named, not only in this age but also in the one to come.
zh: 遠超過一切執政的、掌權的、有能的、作主的，和今生來世所能舉出的一切名銜。

en: And he put all things under his feet and gave him as head over all things to the church,
zh: 神又使萬有都歸服在他的腳下，並且賜他給教會作萬有的元首。

en: which is his body, the fullness of him who fills all in all.
zh: 教會是他的身體，是那充滿萬有者所完全充滿的。
